title: Pure Direct OpenAI Mini | Memory Conflict Prompt Only
description: Single-call OpenAI mini baseline for the memory-conflict case. Answer generation receives no recall; judge memory remains available for scoring.

directHarness.instruction: Treat this as a live MSP compliance and backup-retention decision. Give the first operator response, decision gates, safe holding actions, and evidence/approval requirements. Do not invent authority.
